title: Parkour Timer
description: A mod that allows for a nice and simple way to time parkour runs
body:
A mod that is mainly made to allow for easy timing of parkour runs. Made for [the runners]([https://discord.gg/nhqVd4MqCM](https://discord.gg/nhqVd4MqCM))

# How to use
Press Insert to toggle editing mode. While in editing mode you can press right click to start placing a box and press right click again to stop editing the box. At first pressing right click you will start placing the start box. This is a green box that starts the timer. After you place a green start box you will then place a red end box. The timer times from the end of the green box to the start of the red box. The final time is printed in chat. The time in chat and on the hud is in the format `Seconds:milliseconds`
